cases.prompt: how does the authentication flow work in this codebase?
expectations: Queries the code graph with natural language
Traces callers and callees to build the feature's dependency chain
Returns an explanation grounded in the actual code (not assumptions)
Queries the code graph for callers
Lists each caller with module and qualified name

cases.description: Pre-refactor impact analysis triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I want to rename processPayment — what would be affected?
expectations: Presents the full impact radius before any refactor

cases.description: Architecture overview request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: give me an overview of the main modules and how they relate
expectations: Returns a structured overview with module names and relationships

cases.description: Bug fix request does NOT trigger codebase-explore
cases.prompt: the login button crashes on Safari, fix it
expectations: Does NOT activate codebase-explore as the primary skill
Routes to codi-debugging for root cause analysis
Does NOT stop at exploration — proceeds to debug/fix flow
